actionUnits.condition: EventTrigger (guid d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) on Building3 has m_Delegates eventID=4 (PointerClick) with PersistentCall to MonoBehaviour id 1554268810 using script guid 10a92b1b4549024468ecbc96831def68 (Residential).
